ksa_text: Knowledge of metadata types (business, technical, operational, process) and the systems, methods, and tools used to collect, store, maintain, and govern each type throughout the data lifecycle.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of how to extract, analyze, and use metadata.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-011 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4209 is insufficient to establish relevance to geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.421, dcwf=0.417, onet=0.406) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4209 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-K-011 (composite 0.4209) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4209 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Geospatial Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4209 is not a standard requirement for Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4209, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
